content:
# Recommendations for iter-187 plan agent

## Verdict summary

- **iter-186 lake build GREEN; sorry 82 → 76 (−6, best-case band); 7th consecutive zero-axiom build.**
- **9 of 9 planner-intended lanes dispatched** (Lane M↓ deferred at plan close, gated on iter-186 reviewer absence; no Anthropic quota truncation this iter).
- **2 critics never started at iter-186 plan-phase** (`progress-critic route186` + `blueprint-reviewer iter186`) — semaphore-blocked behind a long refactor agent. iter-187 plan-phase MUST PRIORITY DISPATCH these first.
- **No reviewer-phase subagents dispatched this review** — see `## Subagent skips` in `iter/iter-186/review.md`. This means the iter-187 plan agent receives review-phase signals only from this `recommendations.md` + the prover task_results; the per-file lean-vs-blueprint-checker + lean-auditor dispatches will come from the iter-187 plan-phase verdict cycle.

## CRITICAL / HIGH

### -1. iter-186 Lane I CRITICAL FINDING — circular dependency between `Hom.poleDivisor_degree_eq_finrank` and `Hom.poleDivisor`

The iter-186 prover task_result on `RationalCurveIso.lean` surfaced a **critical misread of the iter-186 directive**: the helper body `Hom.poleDivisor_degree_eq_finrank` cannot close until `Hom.poleDivisor` body lands. Empirically verified: `unfold Hom.poleDivisor` produces a goal `⊢ (Finsupp.sum sorry fun x n ↦ n) = ↑(Module.finrank K(ℙ¹) K(C))` — no `rfl`/`simp`/`rw`/`linarith` chain can substantively progress past literal-sorry in goal.

**Action iter-187**: Reorder Lane I:
- **(a)** `Hom.poleDivisor` body FIRST. Substantive content is the project-bespoke Weil-divisor pullback construction on `[∞] ∈ Div(ℙ¹)` (pullback of effective divisor along finite morphism of curves; sum of preimage points weighted by ramification indices).
- **(b)** Then `Hom.poleDivisor_degree_eq_finrank` body closure via the iter-186 scaffolded 5-step chain (already inline at L483-558): chart-at-∞ → preimage finite → `Ideal.sum_ramification_inertia` → LHS-RHS identifications.

DO NOT escalate Route 2d (iter-183 sig-only breakthrough intact; the circular dep is a directive-phrasing artifact, not a strategic blocker).

### 0. iter-186 Lane B 5-iter CHURNING confirmed + mandatory sorry-decrement gate MISSED — escalate to separated-locus alternative (path c)

iter-186 directive's HIGH-priority `gmscaling-projection-idiom.md` Recipes 2+3 failed:
- **Path III.a refactor LANDED** (term-mode `gmScalingP1_cover_intersection_X_iso`, axiom-clean) but did NOT decrement.
- **Path III.b named projection lemmas** blocked on Mathlib simp pattern coverage gap (`inv (pullback.map _ _ _ _ _ _ _ eq₁ eq₂) ≫ pullback.fst/snd` adjacent to other `pullback.map` not served by `pullbackRightPullbackFstIso_inv_fst/_snd_fst/_snd_snd` — projections must be syntactically displayed, not buried inside outer `pullback.map`).
- **`cancel_mono (PLB.hom)` Mono instance does not synthesize** (PLB.hom is structure morphism to single-point Spec k̄ — not a mono).

**Failure-mode trigger fires**: per iter-186 directive Lane B "Failure mode: if sorry count stays 4 iter-186, iter-187 plan-phase opens the genus-0 separated-locus alternative (Recipe III.c from the expanded chapter sketch); chart-bridge cross-case work pauses." → **EXECUTE**:

- **(a)** Open separated-locus alternative (Recipe III.c from the iter-186 chapter expansion). Pause direct chart-bridge cross-case work.
- **(b)** Consider STRATEGY.md re-estimate on the Genus-0 RR.3 row (iter-185 plan-phase already bumped this to ~20-30; 7th iter on cross01 confirms the bump was warranted).
- **(c)** OPTIONAL: file upstream Mathlib PR to add the missing `pullbackRightPullbackFstIso_inv_fst_eqToHom` / variants that work under outer `pullback.map`. iter-186 chapter expansion documents the exact pattern shape; the PR is ~30 LOC of Mathlib infrastructure.

### 1. iter-186 Lane A.1.b BEST-CASE landing — open iter-187 follow-up for invertibility witness

Lane A.1.b LineBundlePullback closed all 5 typed sorries axiom-clean on the FIRST body attempt. **This is the best-case outcome from the iter-186 plan and confirms STRATEGY.md A.1.b ~200-400 LOC estimate is now LOWER bound.** The closures dropped the invertibility wrapper (Mathlib b80f227 has no `IsInvertible`-on-`Scheme.Modules` predicate) — substantive types, NOT type-weakening; iter-187+ refinement promotes them.

**Action iter-187**:
- **(a)** Open a NEW LANE for `LineBundlePullback` follow-up: introduce a project-side `LineBundle.IsInvertible : (pullback πC πT).Modules → Prop` predicate (or `class`) via local trivialisation on affine open cover. Wrap `OnProduct` / `pullbackAlongProjection` / `pullback_pullback_eq` / `preimage_subgroup` / `functorial` with this witness. Helper budget = 3.
- **(b)** Alternative: dispatch `mathlib-analogist` (mode: cross-domain-inspiration) to check whether Mathlib has ANY domain (`ModuleCat` over `CommRingCat`, `PresheafOfModules`, `Sheaf`, `LocallyRingedSpace.Modules`) with an `IsInvertible`-style predicate that can be lifted to `Scheme.Modules`. If yes, port it; if no, build project-side per (a).
- **(c)** OPTIONAL: file upstream Mathlib PR for `Scheme.Modules.IsInvertible`. ~80-150 LOC infrastructure.

### 2. iter-186 plan-phase semaphore-deadlock — PRIORITY DISPATCH 2 missed critics first iter-187

iter-186 plan-phase suffered a `max_parallel=1` semaphore deadlock: the long-running refactor agent (~33 min) consumed the slot budget, blocking `progress-critic route186` + `blueprint-reviewer iter186`. Both never started; no `jsonl` files created.

**Action iter-187 plan-phase**:
- **PRIORITY DISPATCH** both critics first, before any write-capable subagent. This unblocks the iter-186 absent-verdict carry-forward.
- `blueprint-reviewer iter187` must audit 3 chapters touched since iter-185:
  - `Picard_IdentityComponent.tex` post Path B split (iter-186 writer);
  - `AbelianVarietyRigidity.tex` post gmscaling expansion (iter-186 writer);
  - `Albanese_CodimOneExtension.tex` post Stacks 00TT block (iter-185 writer, NEVER audited);
- `progress-critic route187` per-route trajectory verdicts including the iter-186 lanes.
- Both can run in PARALLEL (the semaphore deadlock was only because a long writeable subagent was queued before them).

### 3. iter-186 Lane M↓ CodimOneExtension — DEFERRED iter-187 GATE depends on reviewer dispatch

iter-186 plan deferred Lane M↓ pending iter-186 blueprint-reviewer audit of the patched Stacks 00TT chapter; the reviewer never started. Lane M↓ remains GATED.

**Action iter-187**:
- After (2) above's `blueprint-reviewer iter187` returns, check its verdict on `Albanese_CodimOneExtension.tex`.
- If PASS or CONDITIONAL PASS without must-fix-this-iter on the chapter → dispatch Lane M↓ per iter-186 objectives recipe.
- If reviewer flags must-fix → defer one more iter.

## MEDIUM

### 4. iter-186 Lane A OCofP refactor handover — steps 3-5 still pending

The iter-186 plan-phase refactor agent terminated mid-flight after landing Steps 1+2 (DVR upgrade in WeilDivisor.lean + `carrierSubmodule` scaffold with 3 closure sorries). The prover closed all 3 closure sorries axiom-clean. **Steps 3-5 of the 5-step recipe NOT landed**:

- **Step 3**: `presheaf` functor body (over the over-category `C : Over (Spec k)`).
- **Step 4**: `presheaf_isSheaf` — after `rw [Presheaf.isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_forget …]`, close Type-valued sheaf-property check via `IsIntegral C.left → IrreducibleSpace C.left.toTopCat` + density of nonempty opens.
- **Step 5**: replace L224-233 body (the existing `lineBundleAtClosedPoint` def) with the new submodule-based construction.

**Action iter-187**:
- **(a)** Re-dispatch `refactor ocofp-carrierset-submodule-recipe-steps3-5` (slug variant). Directive: "Resume from steps 3-5 per `analogies/ocofp-carrierset-submodule-api.md`; carrierSubmodule (Step 2) is on disk axiom-clean from iter-186 prover; build presheaf functor + presheaf_isSheaf + replace L224-233." Helper budget: as needed.
- **(b)** Then re-fire Lane A prover for any remaining bookkeeping after the refactor.

### 5. iter-186 Lane H RRFormula — 2 narrower typed-sorry helpers still pending

Lane H closed `eulerCharacteristic_of_shortExact_skyscraper` main body sorry-free; substantive content factored into 3 sub-helpers; 1 closed axiom-clean (`eulerCharacteristic_iso`); 2 remain:
- `eulerCharacteristic_shortExact_add` — needs project-side LES carrier for `ModuleCat kbar`-valued sheaf cohomology + Grothendieck `H^i = 0 for i ≥ 2` + 6-term alternating-rank identity.
- `eulerCharacteristic_skyscraperSheaf` — needs `Γ(C, skyscraperSheaf P kbar) ≅ kbar` lemma (1-2 iters) + `H¹(C, skyscraper) = 0` flasque-cohomology bridge (Mathlib gap at b80f227 — either Mathlib PR or project-side bridge).

**SLIPPING throughput watch**: Lane H is 11 of 12 iters elapsed. iter-187 closure on either sub-helper would re-affirm CONVERGING trajectory; continued stalling triggers progress-critic OVER_BUDGET verdict iter-187.

**Action iter-187**: Lane H re-dispatch with budget 2 helpers, targeting `eulerCharacteristic_skyscraperSheaf` (the H⁰-identification half — `Γ(C, skyscraperSheaf P kbar) ≅ kbar` — is the most tractable; H¹ flasque-vanishing can wait for upstream).

### 6. iter-186 Lane F QuotScheme Step 4 — IsBaseChange Prop still pending

Lane F closed Step 2 (baseMap construction) axiom-clean; Step 4 (IsBaseChange Prop) deferred. Two routes available:
- **Tilde route** — requires `[IsQuasiCoherent N]` hypothesis added to consumer signature (signature ripple).
- **Module.Flat.isBaseChange algebraic route** (Stacks 02KE) — on `g.appLE V U e` flatness (makes hypothesis explicit).

**Action iter-187**: Lane F re-dispatch with budget 2; pick the Module.Flat route to avoid the signature ripple. Tilde requires more infrastructure.

### 7. iter-186 NEW IdentityComponent — open 4+1 follow-up lanes per Path B chapter split

iter-186 plan-phase blueprint-writer landed the Path B chapter split: 4 per-Kleiman-conclusion theorem blocks + 2 per-Pic⁰ theorem blocks. The corresponding 5 new Lean signatures need scaffolding:
- `IdentityComponent.isSubgroupHomomorphism` (Kleiman (b))
- `IdentityComponent.isFiniteTypeGeometricallyIrreducible` (Kleiman (c))
- `IdentityComponent.baseChangeIso` (Kleiman (d))
- `Pic0Scheme.finrank_eq_genus` (dim equality)
- `Pic0Scheme.kPoints_iff_kerDegree` (k-points iff ker deg)

**Action iter-187**: ONE NEW LANE — file-skeleton extension of `IdentityComponent.lean` adding the 5 declarations as typed sorries pinned to their respective chapter `\lean{...}`. Helper budget = 0 (pure scaffold).

Also iter-187: close `identityComponentCarrier` body (gated on `LocallyConnectedSpace` Mathlib gap — either project-side instance from `IsLocallyNoetherian` or direct construction via affine connected open neighbourhoods). The closed-immersion-half `IsClosed (↑carrier : Set _)` sorry in `isOpenSubgroupScheme` is downstream of this and becomes axiom-clean once the helper lands.

## LOW

### 8. iter-186 Lane E AVR — appTop chase recipe documented; iter-187 mechanical

Lane E refined the residual gap into a documented focused identity `r_1.appTop(isLocElem) = 1` in kbar (uniqueness of `r_1` via `cancel_mono` on `Proj.awayι`). iter-187 closure is a mechanical 6-step recipe (already inline in the task_result) plus 1 private helper `r_1_appTop_isLocElem_eq_one` using `IsOpenImmersion.lift_appTop` or the `Proj.fromOfGlobalSections` recipe.

**Action iter-187**: Lane E re-dispatch with budget 1 helper.

### 9. Blueprint markers iter-187 plan-phase

- `Picard_IdentityComponent.tex` — the iter-186 Path B chapter split correctly references 5 new `\lean{...}` pins; verify the iter-186 NEW IdentityComponent file-skeleton lane (item 7 above) lands the matching declarations so `sync_leanok` can mark them `\leanok`.
- `Picard_LineBundlePullback.tex` — 3 new `% NOTE (iter-186 review)` annotations landed this review marking the carrier-level simplification; iter-187 plan-phase has no marker work here UNTIL item 1's follow-up lane introduces the invertibility witness.

## Verdict carryover (iter-185 reviewer findings still alive iter-187)

- **OcOfD value-pinning forecasting bet** — the lean-auditor iter-185 watch-item is still live. Iter-186 did NOT touch `OcOfD.lean`. iter-187+ when the substantive Hartshorne body is next attempted, must verify definitional match at `D = 0` OR drop the value-pinning. iter-186 status: deferred, no progress, no regression.

## Standing deferrals (unchanged)

- `RelativeSpec.lean` — 0 sorries (Lane D SOLVED iter-185 HARD-BAR SUCCESS). Signature-drift watchlist items (UniversalProperty, affine_base_iff, base_change, functor) remain deferred to iter-200+.
- `OcOfD.lean` — substantive general `sheafOf` body iter-200+ Hartshorne II.7 substrate.
- AlbaneseUP, FlatteningStratification, FGAPicRepresentability, RelPicFunctor, CodimOneExtension (partial), Thm32, Jacobian, BareScheme, RigidityKbar — all iter-200+ off-limits or deferred per STRATEGY.md.
